samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="WIDTH" value="8">FIFO data width.</constant>
        <constant id="DEPTH" value="16">FIFO depth.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <signal id="waddr_bin" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Binary write address.</signal>
        <signal id="raddr_bin" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Binary read address.</signal>
        <signal id="wptr" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Gray code write pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="rptr" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Gray code read pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="wptr_buff" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Buffered write pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="rptr_buff" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Buffered read pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="wptr_syn" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Synchronized write pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="rptr_syn" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Synchronized read pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="wen" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write enable signal.</signal>
        <signal id="ren" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read enable signal.</signal>
        <signal id="wfull" width="1">Write full flag.</signal>
        <signal id="rempty" width="1">Read empty flag.</signal>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Dual-port RAM instantiation
        <submodule id="dual_port_RAM" wclk="wclk" wenc="wen" waddr="waddr_bin" wdata="wdata" rclk="rclk" renc="ren" raddr="raddr_bin" rdata="rdata"/>
        
        // Write pointer management
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                waddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (winc) begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        
        // Read pointer management
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                raddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (rinc) begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        
        // Gray code conversion
        assign wptr = {waddr_bin[WIDTH-1], waddr_bin[WIDTH-1]^waddr_bin[WIDTH-2], waddr_bin[WIDTH-3:0]};
        assign rptr = {raddr_bin[WIDTH-1], raddr_bin[WIDTH-1]^raddr_bin[WIDTH-2], raddr_bin[WIDTH-3:0]};
        
        // Buffering pointers
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                wptr_buff <= wptr;
            end
        end
        
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                rptr_buff <= rptr;
            end
        end
        
        // Synchronization
        assign wptr_syn = wptr_buff;
        assign rptr_syn = rptr_buff;
        
        // Full/Empty flags
        assign wfull = (wptr == {~rptr_syn[WIDTH-1], rptr_syn[WIDTH-2:0]});
        assign rempty = (rptr_syn == wptr);
        
        // Control signals
        assign wen = wptr_syn;
        assign ren = rptr_syn;
    </implementation>
</module>
```
